notes:
v2.0.0 Update
✨ New Features:
• Signal System: Set signal levels per scene (Full / Weak / No Signal). Messages queue in dead zones and arrive on restore. Calls auto-reject with missed call records.
• Signal Dead Zone (V13): Region Behavior for drawing signal-affected areas on the map.
• Weak Signal Mode: Message delay, random send failure with retry, and call drops — all GM-configurable per scene and region.
• Satellite Phone: Mark phones as immune to all signal blocking.
• Custom Frame Themes: Create multiple named frames with image overlay, corner radius, padding, and colors. Real-time preview. ZIP export/import.
• Quoted Literals: Use "ARASAKA"-NNN in number formats for literal text.

announcement.title: 📱 Smartphone Widget v2.0.0
announcement.content:
Smartphone Widget v2.0.0

  • 📡 Signal System: Control where phones work — Full, Weak, or No Signal per scene/region. Messages queue and arrive on restore.
  • 📶 Weak Signal: Message delay, random failure with retry, call drops — all configurable per scene and region.
  • 📡 Satellite Phone: Immune to all signal blocking.
  • 🎨 Custom Frames: Build named frame themes with image overlay, adjust radius/padding/colors with real-time preview. Export as ZIP.
  • 🔢 Quoted Literals: "ARASAKA"-NNN-NNN → ARASAKA-482-193.
